proposed_relations.description: Existing SBS routes achieved 15-20% faster trips, presented as evidence in Nostrand/Rogers SBS slides

evidence_refs.source_quote: • 15% to 20% faster trips • Over 90% customer satisfaction • 10% ridership increase on the entire route, including SBS and local

rationale: Metric about existing SBS route benefits, presented as supporting evidence for the Nostrand/Rogers SBS project.

evidence_refs.source_quote: • 15% to 20% faster trips • Over 90% customer satisfaction • 10% ridership increase on the entire route, including SBS and local

quarantine.note: The metric payload explicitly scopes to 'Existing SBS routes (Fordham Rd, 1st and 2nd Aves)', not to the Nostrand/Rogers project. The evidence block states general SBS benefits from other routes cited as supporting context in the presentation. Co-occurrence in the same deck does not establish a has_metric relation between the Nostrand/Rogers project and metrics about other routes.
